sql_array: CREATE TABLE users (id UUID PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO users (id, name) VALUES (cast('4c6c96be-504b-4a23-aa19-5b4e5256fbb8' as uuid), 'Bob');
UPDATE users SET name = 'Charlie' WHERE id = convert('9ef8c8f4-c9ae-4a5b-baa5-c3e6fa452ef5', uuid);
SELECT * FROM users WHERE sys.isauuid(id) = true;
